/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_cards.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxFreeCell.dir/wx_freecell_dialogs.cpp.o -o wxFreeCell.app/Contents/MacOS/wxFreeCell   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libwx_osx_cocoau_xrc-3.3.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_osx_cocoau_html-3.3.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_osx_cocoau_core-3.3.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_baseu_xml-3.3.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_baseu-3.3.a -lwx_osx_cocoau_core-3.3 -lwxjpeg-3.3 -lwxpng-3.3 -lwxtiff-3.3 -lwxwebp-3.3 -lwxwebpdemux-3.3 -lwxsharpyuv-3.3 -framework AudioToolbox -framework WebKit -lwx_baseu-3.3 /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libexpat.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd -lwxregexu-3.3 /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libiconv.tbd -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation -framework AppKit -framework Carbon -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore
